name: First American Title Insurance Company
description_short: First American Title is a national title insurance and escrow settlement company serving real estate transactions in Denver and across the U.S. with comprehensive closing and settlement services.
description_long:
First American Title is one of the largest and most respected title insurance companies in the nation, with over 130 years of history in the real estate transaction industry. The company operates a downtown Denver office at 1899 Wynkoop Street, Suite 265, serving the Colorado market alongside numerous other locations nationwide. Their core business centers on providing title insurance protection and professional settlement services that facilitate the efficient transfer of real estate properties.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including title insurance policies, escrow settlement services, new agent resources, homebuyer and seller resources, and 1031 exchange facilitation. They provide innovative technology platforms such as FirstAm IgniteRE, Eagle Homebook (digital and print marketing materials for real estate professionals), and remote online notarization (RON) options to modernize the closing experience. The Denver office is staffed with dedicated escrow officers, sales executives, and management personnel available during standard business hours (8 AM–5 PM, Monday–Friday).

First American Title distinguishes itself through substantial corporate recognition, including ranking #51 on Fortune's 100 Best Companies to Work For in 2024 (10 consecutive years), #90 in Fortune Best Workplaces for Women, #15 in Best Workplaces in Financial Services & Insurance, and #50 in PEOPLE Companies that Care. The company provides market intelligence tools like the ALTOS Market Report for localized real estate data and multiple educational resources including FirstAm EDU, a Real Estate Glossary, and multicultural resources. Their technology-forward approach emphasizes efficient, secure, and convenient closing experiences.

However, First American Title is a title insurance and settlement services provider, not a mortgage lender offering home loans. Consumers seeking to finance a home purchase must obtain mortgage financing from a separate lender; First American Title facilitates the closing and title protection aspects of the transaction. The company's services are primarily B2B (working with real estate agents and professionals) and B2C (working with buyers and sellers at closing), making them a crucial but downstream partner in the mortgage process rather than a direct source of mortgage capital.
address: 1630 S Stapley Dr Suite 123, Mesa, AZ 85204

company_info.headquarters: 1630 S Stapley Dr Suite 123, Mesa, AZ 85204

pros: Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For for 10 consecutive years, indicating organizational stability and employee satisfaction
Over 130 years of industry experience with established reputation as one of the nation's largest title insurance providers
Remote Online Notarization (RON) capability for more convenient, secure, and modern closing experiences
Comprehensive technology suite including FirstAm IgniteRE, Eagle Homebook, and ALTOS market intelligence reports
Dedicated local team in Denver with named escrow officers, sales executives, and management staff with direct contact information
Multicultural resources and educational tools (FirstAm EDU, Real Estate Glossary) supporting diverse client populations
Full-service settlement offerings including 1031 exchanges and earnest money deposit handling via ZOCCAM
cons: Not a mortgage lender—does not provide home loans or financing; only handles title insurance and closing services
Limited to real estate closing and title services; cannot address broader financial needs like refinancing or alternative mortgage products
Downtown Denver office location may be inconvenient for suburban or rural Colorado consumers without additional branch accessibility details
Website content does not provide pricing, fee structures, or competitive rate comparisons for title insurance services
No indication of customer service channels beyond phone, fax, and email; no live chat or 24/7 support mentioned
best_for: Real estate agents and professionals seeking title insurance, settlement services, and marketing tools for transactions
Homebuyers and sellers in the Denver metro area closing on residential or commercial properties
Investors conducting 1031 exchanges or managing multiple real estate transactions requiring professional escrow services
diagnosis: First American Title is best for real estate professionals (agents, brokers, investors) and homebuyers/sellers in Colorado requiring title insurance, escrow settlement, and closing services during a purchase or refinance transaction. The key caveat is that this company does not originate or fund mortgages—it operates as a closing and title protection partner downstream from a mortgage lender, making it essential for transaction completion but not a source of home financing.
